title: Days Between Dates (JS)
description:
Given two date strings in `DD/MM/YYYY` format, return the number of days from `start` to `end`.

**Example 1:**
Input: `"05/01/2023"`, `"10/01/2023"` → `5`

**Example 2:**
Input: `"01/03/2023"`, `"01/05/2023"` → `61`

**Constraints:** end is always after start.
hint: After splitting on `/`, which index is the day and which is the month? `new Date(year, month, day)` uses a 0-indexed month.
